title: DIY Automatic Screen Printing Machine
description: GRBL-controlled automatic screen printing machine with NEMA23 stepper-driven squeegee carriage and pneumatic pressure cylinder for consistent ink transfer on flat substrates up to 400 mm wide.
objective: Squeegee speed 100–300 mm/s; pressure 2–5 N/cm; registration ±0.25 mm; 400 mm print width; automated flood-print-lift cycle.
constraints: 24 V stepper supply; compressed air 4–6 bar; Arduino Mega + GRBL; BOM < ₹8000.
supporting_fact_titles: Screen Printing — Squeegee Pressure and Ink Rheology
design_element_titles: DIY Automatic Screen Printing — Squeegee Motor Drive

element_usage_notes.DIY Automatic Screen Printing — Squeegee: NEMA23 stepper + 5 mm lead screw; pneumatic Z-axis for squeegee pressure.
element_usage_notes.NEMA17 Stepper + DRV8825 Microstepping D: 1/16 microstepping for 0.016 mm/step position resolution on squeegee carriage.
